base_context.description: The next run will be this leader/base config plus ONLY the JSON changes returned by the advisor.

expected_direction: improve selected objective by changing entry quality/profile selection without starving trades
expected_effect: Should test whether charm_wall_breakaway_long can add one or two high-payoff VALID_0DTE continuation trades while preserving profile PnL/exposure above roughly 225 and total net profit within 98% of run_001. Main risk is admitting weak wall-chase entries; reject if worst MAE worsens, profile efficiency falls materially, or total PnL/exposure declines.
label: charm-wall-geometry-followthrough
rationale: Choose exactly one legal family: batch_d_charm_wall_breakaway_long. The strongest recent positive experiment was charm-wall admission geometry, while exit compression and direct 1DTE/pullback tightening have hurt. This keeps the mechanism to profile-specific admission breadth, avoids global veto tightening, avoids take-profit compression, and protects pullback/squeeze/charm-pin fast winners.
strategy_plan_next_experiments: Dormant Charm Pin Avoid Split Probe
